context_assembler_compare_current.description: ContextAssembler compare-rankings baseline dataset using the current ranking strategy

context_assembler_compare_depth_repeats_.description: ContextAssembler compare-rankings dataset using the depth-repeats-context strategy

context_assembler_compare_dummy.description: ContextAssembler compare-rankings dataset using the dummy ranking strategy

context_assembler_compare_multiplicative.description: ContextAssembler compare-rankings dataset using the multiplicative-boost strategy

context_assembler_compare_random_picking.description: ContextAssembler compare-rankings dataset using the random-picking strategy (hyperparameter-tuned weights)

context_assembler_compare_current_defaul.description: ContextAssembler compare-rankings dataset using the current ranking strategy with manually set default coefficients (no hyperparameter tuning)

context_assembler_compare_multiplicative.description: ContextAssembler compare-rankings dataset using the multiplicative-boost strategy with manually set default coefficients (no hyperparameter tuning)

context_assembler_compare_cpg_structural.description: ContextAssembler compare-rankings dataset using the CPG structural ranking strategy (hyperparameter-tuned weights)

context_assembler_compare_evidence_budge.description: ContextAssembler compare-rankings dataset using the evidence-budgeted ranking strategy (hyperparameter-tuned weights)

context_assembler_compare_security_first.description: ContextAssembler compare-rankings dataset using the security-first strategy

context_assembler_compare_security_score.description: ContextAssembler compare-rankings dataset using the security-score-only strategy

context_assembler_compare_smoke_test.description: Shortest-sample smoke-test dataset for quick local llama.cpp validation
